cleavage agent: Proteins were digested by lug trypsin overnight at 37 °C.
fragmentation method: The top 40 precursors of the highest abundance in the full scan were selected and fragmented by higher energy collisional dissociation (HCD)
instrument: UHPLC-MS/MS analyses were performed using the EASY-nLCTM 1200 UHPLC system coupled with a Q ExactiveTM HF-X mass spectrometer
labeling: Mass spectrometry was performed at Novogene Co. Ltd.
